next_cycle_focus: If this batch yields a clean pass, exploit the strongest VIRTUAL 2h family with tighter confirmation variants; otherwise rotate to a fresh asset/concept branch.
rationale: Current VIRTUAL 2h exploration cycle remains open as a real three-spec batch. This reflection packet contained no fresh results or lessons, so there is no evidence to refine or abandon any of the three new VIRTUAL families yet. The cycle still consists of three materially distinct value-acceptance breakout branches: VWAP/Keltner acceptance, Donchian pressure release, and Supertrend VWAP expansion.
